description: Sample Memory MCP create_entities calls from Lab 10.2 — storing decisions and context (not code facts — reindex handles those automatically)

entities.name: ContosoUniversity-Decisions
observations: Chose repository pattern over direct DbContext access for testability
SQL Server for production, SQLite for integration tests via WebApplicationFactory
gh-aw PRD workflow triggers on feature/** branches — do NOT use for hotfixes
Code review requires approval from @code-reviewer agent before merge
Has gh-aw workflow for automated code review on pull requests
Lab orchestrator delegates to dotnet-dev, dotnet-qa, then code-reviewer

entities.name: CleanArchitecture
observations: Core has no dependencies, Infrastructure depends on Core, Web depends on both
